title: TechZeph .portfolio/project.json
description: Contract for a repo's .portfolio/project.json, consumed by scripts/sync-github-projects.mjs -> normalizeProject. Every field is optional; the sync script derives sensible fallbacks from the GitHub repo. `slug` is normally derived from the repo name (override only if needed). The public `done` list is NOT set here - it is generated from recent commit subjects - unless `doneOverride` is provided. Future-work lives in .portfolio/progress.json.

slug.description: Override the URL slug. Defaults to a slugified repo name. Lowercase, hyphen-separated.

title.description: Public portfolio title. Defaults to a titleized repo name.

status.description: Honest project status. Defaults to a value inferred from GitHub topics, else 'Built'.

type.description: Plain-language project type, e.g. 'CLI tool'. Defaults to the primary language or 'GitHub project'.

summary.description: One or two clear, modest sentences. Defaults to the GitHub description.

role.description: Build role / context label (renders as 'Build role'). Defaults to 'Project owner'.

tags.description: 3-8 portfolio tags for grouping/scanning. Compacted to a max of 8 (deduped). Each tag also links to its /topics/<slug> page.

skills.description: Concrete skills/tools/concepts. Compacted to a max of 12 (deduped). If omitted, inferred from languages + topics.

complexityNotes.description: Factual visitor-facing build-context note (renders as 'Build context'). Not a rating.

currentState.description: What currently exists / is shipped. Defaults to 'Public GitHub repository. Last pushed <date>.'

caseStudy.description: Optional narrative depth. Each field is a short paragraph. Omit any field or the whole object; the section is skipped when all three are empty. Must be verifiable from the repo - no hype, no invented outcomes.

highlights.description: Up to 5 short, factual proof points. Scannable bullets distinct from the commit-derived done[] history.

learned.description: Up to 5 short 'what I took away' bullets (renders as 'What I learned').

related.description: Slugs of OTHER projects to cross-link (renders as internal 'Related projects' links). Unknown slugs are filtered at render time. Capped at 6.

featured.description: Curation flag. Featured projects sort first on the index pages. Defaults to false.

order.description: Manual ranking key (ascending) applied after `featured`. Lower sorts earlier. Defaults to 9999.

category.description: Single grouping label for future filtering, e.g. 'Web', 'Automation', 'AI'. Does not overload tags.

demoUrl.description: Live interactive demo URL, rendered as a CTA button distinct from the repo and homepage links.

started.description: When work started. YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD.

shipped.description: When it shipped. YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD.

ogImage.description: Override social-share image (absolute URL). When omitted, the free GitHub auto-generated social-preview image (opengraph.githubassets.com) is used.

doneOverride.description: The ONLY sanctioned way to bypass the commit-derived done[] list. When this is a non-empty array, it replaces the generated done items. Capped at 8. Leave empty to keep the default commit-derived behaviour.

include.description: Force inclusion even without one of the portfolio GitHub topics. Forks/archived repos need this set to true to appear.
